title: B-boy Yang Haoli joins breaking challenge to gear up for Paris 2024 - CGTN
author: CGTN
description: Yang Haoli, a student from Beijing Sport University, took up CGTN's #DanceforPeace global breaking challenge and showed his energetic moves. Film your performance, tag us and show your talent!
